_note: Third-party vendor MCP presets mirroring Aleph's src/mcp/presets/catalog.json. CROSS-REPO ID CONTRACT (P-Provenance): `id` MUST be `aleph-hub:<catalog.json id>` (the Aleph preset slug, e.g. aleph-hub:context7) — NOT `aleph-hub:<full_name>`. Aleph's cold-start primer projects each preset to `aleph-hub:<id>` (src/hub/official_mcp.rs), and installed-state is reconciled by that id (install.rs mcp_server_id: id.replace([':','/'],'_')). A divergent id silently breaks the primer→remote 'installed' handoff. `full_name`/`repo_url` keep the real upstream identity for provenance.

entries.name: Context7
entries.author: Upstash
entries.description_en: Inject version-accurate, up-to-date library docs into context to cut hallucination.
entries.description_zh: 把版本精确的最新库文档注入上下文，减少幻觉。
entries.long_en: Context7 fetches current, version-specific documentation and code examples for libraries and frameworks on demand, so answers reflect the API you actually use.
entries.long_zh: Context7 按需拉取库/框架的版本精确最新文档与示例，让回答贴合你实际使用的 API。
entries.sec_note_en: Official Upstash hosted MCP endpoint (anonymous, no key); an npx stdio fallback also exists upstream.
entries.sec_note_zh: Upstash 官方托管 MCP 端点（匿名、无需密钥）；上游另有 npx stdio 兜底形态。

entries.name: 智谱视觉理解 Z.AI Vision
entries.author: 智谱 AI Z.AI

env.name: Z_AI_API_KEY
env.description: 智谱编程套餐 API Key (bigmodel.cn/coding-plan)

env.name: Z_AI_MODE
env.description: 服务平台：ZHIPU（大陆）或 ZAI（海外）

entries.description_en: Gives coding agents sight: screenshot-to-code, OCR, error-screenshot diagnosis, and diagram/chart understanding (GLM-4.6V, official Z.AI/Zhipu).
entries.description_zh: 给代码 agent 加视觉：截图转代码 / OCR / 报错诊断 / 图表与架构图理解（GLM-4.6V，智谱官方）。
entries.long_en: The official Z.AI (Zhipu) Vision MCP server gives coding agents sight via eight GLM-4.6V-powered tools — UI-screenshot-to-code, screenshot OCR, error-dialog diagnosis, technical-diagram reading, data-visualization analysis, UI diff checking, general image analysis, and video analysis — over an npx stdio process.
entries.long_zh: 智谱官方视觉理解 MCP，给代码 agent 补上视觉能力：经 npx stdio 暴露 8 个 GLM-4.6V 工具——UI 截图转代码、截图 OCR、报错截图诊断、技术图/架构图解读、数据可视化分析、UI 对比验证、通用图像理解与视频解析。
entries.sec_note_en: Needs a Z.AI/Zhipu API key (Z_AI_API_KEY, GLM Coding Plan) plus optional region switch Z_AI_MODE; runs an npx-spawned Node process and calls Z.AI's paid GLM-4.6V cloud API. Distributed as the official @z_ai npm package — no public source repository.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需智谱 API Key（Z_AI_API_KEY，编程套餐）及可选区域开关 Z_AI_MODE；经 npx 拉起 Node 子进程，调用智谱付费 GLM-4.6V 云 API。以官方 @z_ai npm 包分发——无公开源码仓库。

entries.name: 高德地图 Amap
entries.author: 高德 AutoNavi

env.name: AMAP_MAPS_API_KEY
env.description: 高德 Web 服务 API Key (console.amap.com)

entries.description_en: Geocoding, POI search, route planning, and weather from AutoNavi (Amap), China-native.
entries.description_zh: 地理编码、POI 搜索、路线规划、天气（高德官方，大陆原生）。
entries.long_en: The official Amap maps MCP server exposes location services — geocoding, place search, routing, and weather — over an npx stdio process.
entries.long_zh: 高德官方地图 MCP，经 npx stdio 提供地理编码、地点搜索、路线规划与天气等位置服务。
entries.sec_note_en: Requires an Amap Web-service API key (AMAP_MAPS_API_KEY); distributed as the official @amap npm package — no public source repository.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需高德 Web 服务 API Key（AMAP_MAPS_API_KEY）；以高德官方 @amap npm 包分发——无公开源码仓库。

entries.name: MiniMax
entries.author: MiniMax
entries.description_en: Image, video, and speech synthesis from MiniMax (official).
entries.description_zh: 图像 / 视频 / 语音合成（MiniMax 官方）。
entries.long_en: The official MiniMax MCP server exposes the platform's generative media APIs — image, video, and text-to-speech — over a uvx stdio process.
entries.long_zh: MiniMax 官方 MCP，经 uvx stdio 暴露平台的生成式媒体能力——图像、视频与语音合成。
entries.sec_note_en: Needs a MiniMax API key (MINIMAX_API_KEY) and region host (MINIMAX_API_HOST); calls MiniMax's paid cloud APIs.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需 MiniMax API Key（MINIMAX_API_KEY）与区域接入点（MINIMAX_API_HOST）；调用 MiniMax 付费云 API。

entries.name: 火山引擎 veImageX
entries.author: 火山引擎 ByteDance
entries.description_en: Text-to-image, super-resolution, outpainting, and OCR image capabilities from Volcengine (official).
entries.description_zh: 文生图 / 超分 / 外扩 / OCR 等图像能力（火山引擎官方）。
entries.long_en: The official Volcengine veImageX MCP server exposes image generation and processing — text-to-image, super-resolution, outpainting, and OCR — over a uvx stdio process.
entries.long_zh: 火山引擎官方 veImageX MCP，经 uvx stdio 暴露文生图、超分、外扩、OCR 等图像生成与处理能力。
entries.sec_note_en: Needs Volcengine AK/SK plus SERVICE_ID and DOMAIN_NAME; runs a uvx-spawned Python process and calls Volcengine's paid cloud APIs.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需火山 AK/SK 及 SERVICE_ID、加速域名（DOMAIN_NAME）；经 uvx 拉起 Python 子进程，调用火山付费云 API。
